title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset password from Settings > Security.

title: Refund Policy
content: Refunds are allowed within 7 days of purchase.

title: Update Email Address
content: You can update your email address in the Profile section of your account dashboard.

title: Subscription Cancellation
content: To cancel your subscription, go to Billing > Subscriptions and click on 'Cancel Plan'.

title: Supported Payment Methods
content: We support credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), PayPal, and Google Pay.

title: Upgrade to Pro
content: To upgrade your account to the Pro tier, visit the Pricing page or go to Settings > Billing and click 'Upgrade Plan'.

title: Find Receipt or Invoice
content: All past receipts and invoices can be downloaded directly from the Billing > Payment History tab.

title: Delete Account
content: If you wish to permanently delete your account, you can do so at Settings > Privacy > Delete Account. This action is irreversible.

title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
content: You can secure your account by enabling Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) under Settings > Security.

title: Contact Human Support
content: If the automated assistant cannot help you, please email our support team directly at support@example.com.
